title: helichrysum makranicum
intro: Helichrysum makranicum, also known as the Iranian tarragon or Persian tarragon, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Middle East and South Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helichrysum makranicum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
